commands.review_summary:
Refreshes the Kitchen Sink generated OpenClaw surface from `openclaw@2026.5.22` to `2026.5.24-beta.2`, adding stricter surface checks and runtime probes for new registrars.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a generated-surface maintenance PR, not a bug report. The relevant check is whether the PR diff matches the target OpenClaw package surface and repository validation policy.
commands.review_followup: This member-authored PR should stay open for maintainer/security review of the beta dependency, host-version compatibility impact, and Socket warning rather than be auto-closed or auto-repaired.

target.title: chore: refresh kitchen sink OpenClaw surface
target.body:
## Summary
- refresh the Kitchen Sink generated OpenClaw surface to `openclaw@2026.5.24-beta.2`
- cover the current OpenClaw source/main seam set with 55 registrars, 37 hooks, 20 manifest contracts, and 311 SDK exports
- harden the surface reader/checker so source checkouts prefer `src/**` over stale `dist/**` output and compare full generated surface, not only SDK imports
- add valid generated probes for meeting-notes sources and node CLI features, plus runtime assertions for both

## Verification
- `node@22 npm ci`
- `node@22 npm run check`
- `node@22 npm run plugin:inspect:runtime`
- `node@22 npm run pack:check`
- `node@22 npm run pack:zip`
- `OPENCLAW_PACKAGE_ROOT=/Users/m1/GIT/_Perso/openclaw node scripts/check-target-sdk-imports.mjs`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- GitHub Actions `Check` run `26421009091`: `check` and `clawhub-dry-run / publish` passed
- GitHub Actions `CodeQL` run `26421007749`: actions and javascript-typescript analyses passed
- Socket Security PR Alerts and Project Report passed

## Remote proof
Attempted AWS Crabbox one-shot validation, but lease creation failed before a runner was allocated:

- `run_c3f2d833216e`: `RunInstances` 400 for `c7a.8xlarge`
- `run_82fa06aca43a`: `RunInstances` 400 for `c7a.4xlarge`
- `run_5535d51cc909`: `RunInstances` 400 for `m7i.large`
- `run_d83b79793e1d`: `RunInstances` 400 for default `c7a.8xlarge`
- `run_8e38ab5d7a89`: `RunInstances` 400 for default `c7a.8xlarge`

No `cbx_...` lease was created for this task. Repo-owned GitHub checks and Socket checks are green.
target.author: vincentkoc
